question:
Over $30M committed to the Solomon public sale?

Description: This market will resolve to “Yes” if total commitments for the Solomon raise on MetaDAO exceeds the number specified in the title before the raise closes. Otherwise, it will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source is the official Solomon raise page on MetaDAO, available at https://metadao.fi/projects/solomon/fundraise

If the final commitment amount cannot be verified by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, or if relevant information becomes permanently unavailable within the market timeframe, this market will resolve to “No.”

evidences.title: MetaDAO
evidences.content: Raise plan: Default Structure: 20% of gross allocated by MetaDAO to seed Solomon token liquidity; 80% nets to Solomon DAO treasury Minimum close: $2M, sufficient runway to bootstrap Ideal target: ~$5M to $8M - This amount will only be taken if the sale is oversubscribed by orders of magnitude. We want real unmet demand after the raise closes. Use of target capital: (1) put the treasury to work day one (generate ~16% APR) (2) fund liquidity-mining to accelerate TVL growth (3) seed deeper USDv/USDC liquidity and (4) reduce fees and improve terms with venues (custody providers and exchanges) ICO details: Token: `SoLo9oxzLDpcq1dpqAgMwgce5WqkRDtNXK7EPnbmeta` `SoLo9oxzLDpcq1dpqAgMwgce5WqkRDtNXK7EPnbmeta` ### Terms & Conditions [...] Raise plan: Default Structure: 20% of gross allocated by MetaDAO to seed Solomon token liquidity; 80% nets to Solomon DAO treasury Minimum close: $2M, sufficient runway to bootstrap Ideal target: ~$5M to $8M - This amount will only be taken if the sale is oversubscribed by orders of magnitude. We want real unmet demand after the raise closes. Use of target capital: (1) put the treasury to work day one (generate ~16% APR) (2) fund liquidity-mining to accele...
